ProfessionalExperience

Worked with local insurance and real estate businesses to enhance digital networking and create effective social media marketing and brand awareness campaigns.

Used WordPress to improve SERP rank and inform webpage visitors about mortgage loans, credit scores and underwriting procedures.

Used statistical software to measure performance and optimize budget allocation.

Assisted students in one-on-one Excel and QuickBooks tutoring sessions
